org.arakhne.neteditor.android.graphics

Class TransparentViewGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.DelegatedVectorGraphics2D<DroidViewGraphics2D>
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.graphics.DelegatedViewGraphics2D
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.graphics.TransparentViewGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ZoomableContext, ViewGraphics2D

    public class TransparentViewGraphics2D
extends DelegatedViewGraphics2D
    Implementation of a graphics context which is delegating to another graphics context but by forcing the transparency drawing parameters.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel
